name: openEuler sig-QT SIG
description: The QT team is responsible for the development and maintenance of QT in the openeuler community.

name: openEuler sig-QT SIG Repository List
description: openEuler sig-QT SIG maintains 94 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-QT SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The QT team is responsible for the development and maintenance of QT in the openeuler community.. The SIG has 5 core members and maintains 94 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-QT SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-QT SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at qt@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-QT SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-QT SIG maintains 94 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-QT.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-QT SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-QT SIG has 5 Maintainers, including: Dou Yan, Pei Jiankang, WeiDong. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
